name: Business Growth KDNA
description: Domain cognition for business growth, value proposition, pricing, trust building, monetization, and IP positioning.

name: Communication KDNA
description: Domain cognition for conflict resolution, needs diagnosis, emotional states, and communication strategy.

name: Sales KDNA
description: Domain cognition for sales judgment — price objections as certainty deficits, trust diagnosis, and deal advancement.

name: Management KDNA
description: Domain cognition for management judgment — execution failures as system outputs, delegation, and team dynamics.

name: Silver Age Service KDNA
description: Domain cognition for silver-age service — psychological entry cost, dignity preservation, and elder engagement.

name: Product Decision KDNA
description: Domain cognition for product decision-making — hypothesis validation over feature delivery.
